visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split-screen layout. On the left, a stainless steel pot simmers on a gas stovetop, containing bright red spicy sauce, cylindrical rice cakes, and sliced green onions. On the right, a young woman with long dark hair and red lipstick, wearing a white t-shirt, holds a white ice cream sandwich and prepares to take a bite. Bright, even indoor lighting illuminates both scenes. (2) A close-up shot shows a hand dipping a vanilla and chocolate swirl soft-serve ice cream cone upside down into a bubbling pot of red tteokbokki sauce. Cartoonish graphics and a red question mark icon appear as overlays. (3) The woman is seated at a table against a plain, light-colored interior wall. She is surrounded by several colorful instant tteokbokki cups featuring Pinkfong Baby Shark branding (red, yellow, and white). She holds a soft-serve cone in one hand while gesturing excitedly toward the camera. (4) Close-up shots follow the woman as she samples various flavors. First, she uses a fork to eat rice cakes covered in a thick, dark brown jajangmyeon sauce. Next, she uses a spoon to lift rice cakes and a soft-boiled egg from a creamy white sauce in a yellow cup. Sparkle emojis and variety-show style captions frequently pop up. (5) The woman prepares a larger serving of red spicy rice cakes on a white plate. She places a full soft-serve ice cream cone upside down into the center of the pile and uses chopsticks to stir and melt the ice cream into the sauce, turning it a pale orange color. (6) She holds up a colorful plastic bag of 'Wow' brand Rose-flavor rice cakes to the camera. She takes a bite of her mixed ice cream concoction and looks contemplative, then eats a piece of the packaged Rose flavor for comparison. (7) In a final medium shot, the woman smiles broadly, giving a thumbs up while holding one of the tteokbokki cups. Final logos for Carrefour and Momo appear as a graphic transition.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 韓國流行中的超震撼組合. [Variety]: 🍦霜淇淋辣炒年糕😘. (2) [Slogan]: 韓國內行人才知道?. (3) [Subtitle]: 在辣炒年糕떡볶이還會加霜淇淋吃? 😳. (4) [Slogan]: 超多人說意外好吃?!. (5) [Slogan]: 🧪實驗歐膩🇰🇷. (6) [Subtitle]: 準備好了!. [Slogan]: 我去家樂福時發現了! 以前只有在韓國才有賣的辣炒年糕!. (7) [Subtitle]: 霜淇淋的話, 等等做這個洞洞年糕的時候加看看好了. (8) [Subtitle]: 味道...不知道, 我也沒吃過. [Slogan]: (土生土長韓國人🇰🇷). (9) [Subtitle]: 先吃看看Pinkfong Baby Shark Topokki. [Variety]: 🤍炸醬口味. (10) [Subtitle]: 天啊...這可以排第一名😂👍. [Variety]: 醬料超道地、超好吃, 年糕超級Q彈!!!. (11) [Subtitle]: 因為今天想吃很多, 所以做了兩人份裝進杯子裡. [Variety]: (給自己一個大大的讚). (12) [Subtitle]: 這個是微辣口味. [Variety]: 🧡微辣口味. (13) [Subtitle]: 它的特色是辣度不高, 帶點微辣微甜的味道. (14) [Subtitle]: 很像韓國小學校門口在賣的那種經典辣炒年糕!. (15) [Subtitle]: 下一個是白醬口味. [Variety]: 🤍白醬口味. (16) [Subtitle]: 我不知道為什麼, 這個想用湯匙吃~. [Slogan]: 吃起來就像在喝熱呼呼的濃湯一樣~. (17) [Subtitle]: 裡面真的有雞蛋!!!. (18) [Subtitle]: 很推薦給不喜歡太刺激口味的人. (19) [Subtitle]: 原來在韓國的人都在吃這麼好吃的辣炒年糕!. (20) [Subtitle]: 醬料整體非常有好滋味, 不會辣. 是無論男女老少都會喜歡的口味啦. (21) [Subtitle]: 而且年糕是海鮮造型, 好可愛. 應該小孩子也會喜歡❤️. (22) [Subtitle]: 洞洞年糕也做好了. (23) [Subtitle]: 一, 二...吃冰淇淋版本前, 先吃看看原味吧!. (24) [Subtitle]: 喔??? 連年糕裡面也醬料滿滿, 因為這是洞洞年糕. (25) [Subtitle]: 這個比剛剛那個辣一點, 完全是韓國在地的味道🇰🇷. (26) [Subtitle]: 如果你吃得了辛拉麵, 這個辣度就沒問題. (27) [Subtitle]: 一, 二, 三!. [Slogan]: 到底是什麼味道呢?. (28) [Subtitle]: 我覺得可以先加一半看看, 然後再攪拌~. (29) [Subtitle]: 顏色真的有變!. [Slogan]: (眼神震撼中). (30) [Subtitle]: 蛤?.... 我吃看看真正的Rose辣炒年糕, 我再跟大家說一下味道. (31) [Subtitle]: ❤️Rose口味辣炒年糕. (32) [Subtitle]: 嗯~! 就是這個味道啦!!!. (33) [Subtitle]: 加冰淇淋之後變太甜了, 然後油膩的味道更嚴重. (34) [Subtitle]: 但他們的是一般韓式Rose辣炒年糕口味, 所以辣味、鹹味、甜味還有起司的風味還是都有存在!. (35) [Subtitle]: 如果想吃那種有加牛奶的柔和口味的辣炒年糕的話, 我覺得... (36) [Subtitle]: 直接買一般的粉紅醬口味比較好!!! 對對對. (37) [Subtitle]: 這些韓國在地辣炒年糕現在家樂福、momo都買得到!. [Logo]: Pinkfong. [Logo]: 家樂福. [Logo]: momo.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character appears as the host.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair and fair skin. She wears a simple white t-shirt and has bright red lipstick.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video shifts between a kitchen setting with a gas stove and cooking pots, and a dining/living area with a plain, neutral-colored wall where the host sits at a table cluttered with food products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic pop BGM featuring a driving drum beat. A female voice with a bright, high-pitched tone speaks rapidly in Mandarin, introducing a food trend. Faint sizzling and bubbling sounds are layered in. (2) A quick 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition. The speaker's excitement is audible through frequent rising intonations. A 'bubble' SFX plays each time a variety caption appears on the screen. (3) The sound of plastic rustling and a metallic fork clinking against a paper cup becomes prominent. This is followed by a clear, audible bite and chewing sounds, accompanied by the speaker's vocalized 'Mmm' of satisfaction. (4) A slurping sound is heard as she eats a creamy sauce. A bright 'ding' bell sound effect highlights a specific discovery. The BGM maintains a steady, cheerful rhythm. (5) A rubbery 'boing' sound effect plays when the ice cream cone is added to the plate. The sound of wet mixing and sauce splashing is audible as the host stirs the food with chopsticks. (6) The speaker's vocal tone shifts to a questioning, slightly confused 'Eh?' as she tastes the mixture. The BGM volume ducks slightly to emphasize this reaction. (7) The video ends with an enthusiastic, high-arousal closing sentence. A final sparkling synthesizer chime SFX plays as the audio fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Sequential Testing -> Climax Experiment -> Comparative Conclusion -> CTA.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review a series of Korean instant spicy rice cake products while simultaneously testing a viral social media trend of mixing ice cream with spicy tteokbokki. It provides a first-hand taste test of individual flavors (Jajang, Mild Spicy, White Sauce) and concludes that purchasing pre-made Rose-flavored rice cakes is superior to the DIY ice cream method.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host explicitly mentions where to purchase the items (Carrefour and Momo), displays brand logos, and conducts a full review of the product lineup.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form social media content using variety-show editing techniques to maintain viewer engagement during a food review.
